CurrentIssues.ID: LongParameterList:CameraPreview.ios.kt$( modifier: Modifier, cameraSession: CameraSession, camSelector: CamSelector, captureMode: CaptureMode, camFormat: CamFormat, imageCaptureStrategy: ImageCaptureStrategy, scaleType: ScaleType, imageAnalyzer: ImageAnalyzer?, implementationMode: ImplementationMode, isImageAnalysisEnabled: Boolean, isFocusOnTapEnabled: Boolean, isPinchToZoomEnabled: Boolean, previewBackgroundColor: Color, onTapFocus: (Offset) -> Unit, onSwitchCamera: (ImageBitmap) -> Unit, content: @Composable () -> Unit, )
